title: Lindy Donoho
compiled_truth: Lindy Donoho is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (1980-01-01 to 2002-05-06), Lindy Donoho sent 280 and received 1669 emails, totalling 1949 interactions. Top correspondents: [Steven Harris](people/steven-harris) (86), [Kimberly Watson](people/kimberly-watson) (51), [Tk Lohman](people/tk-lohman) (41), [Lorraine Lindberg](people/lorraine-lindberg) (38), [Michelle Lokay](people/michelle-lokay) (36).
